{"schema":"irin.directive.proposal.v1","authority":"recommend","verdict":"Act","in_response_to":"esc-0005","rationale":"Checker assessed the high-urgency 95% /var disk escalation as meeting bar for recommend-only dispatch citing direct ledger-write risk and actionability; Analyst confirmed threshold met with concrete metric and bounded blast radius, reaching 100% convergence on Worker dispatch.","job":"investigate-disk-usage","scope":{"tenant":"initech","subject":"/var","allowed_actions":["read","report"]},"stop_condition":"once usage drops below 80% or ledger writes healthy","return_expectation":"summary of disk audit findings and remediation status"}
